allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 10 -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" "https://jagopro.org/api/health")

Bash(curl -s --max-time 15 -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" -H "Accept: application/json,text/html" "https://jagopro.org/api/health")

Bash(timeout 300 bash -c 'while true; do STATUS=$\(doctl apps list-deployments a43c00a9-e0f1-4507-802c-7917f46dc884 2>&1 | grep d111e9f0\); echo "$\(date -u +%H:%M:%S\) $STATUS"; PHASE=$\(echo "$STATUS" | grep -oE "BUILDING|DEPLOYING|ACTIVE|ERROR"\); if [ "$PHASE" = "ACTIVE" ] || [ "$PHASE" = "ERROR" ]; then break; fi; sleep 15; done')

Bash(timeout 240 bash -c 'while true; do STATUS=$\(doctl apps list-deployments a43c00a9-e0f1-4507-802c-7917f46dc884 2>&1 | grep d111e9f0\); PHASE=$\(echo "$STATUS" | grep -oE "ACTIVE|ERROR"\); echo "$\(date -u +%H:%M:%S\) $PHASE $STATUS"; if [ "$PHASE" = "ACTIVE" ] || [ "$PHASE" = "ERROR" ]; then break; fi; sleep 20; done')

Bash(timeout 300 bash -c 'while true; do R=$\(doctl apps list-deployments a43c00a9-e0f1-4507-802c-7917f46dc884 2>&1 | grep d111e9f0\); P=$\(echo "$R" | grep -oE "ACTIVE|ERROR"\); echo "$\(date -u +%H:%M:%S\) [$P]"; if [ "$P" = "ACTIVE" ] || [ "$P" = "ERROR" ]; then echo "$R"; break; fi; sleep 20; done')
